treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 40 mg PO daily for 14 days, then decrease to 30 mg daily

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for evaluation of bloody diarrhea and abdominal pain
Colonoscopy performed showing isolated ulcers throughout the colon
Prescribed Prednisone for treatment of Crohn's disease

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with GI doctor for ongoing medication evaluation
